expectations.desc: On a successful extract, artifacts/<project>/context.md contains a single '## Brand' section carrying accent, accentAlt, fontPack, and label keys (merged, not duplicated).
accent and accentAlt are 6-digit hex values and are not pure black, pure white, or body grey (real brand colors derived from the capture, not invented).
fontPack is exactly one of modern | editorial | bold | tech (a runtime-supported pack), never a raw font family.
artifacts/<project>/assets/captures/brand-capture.json exists with source, colors, fonts, screenshots, label, and via fields (or an 'error' field on a clean reachability failure).
When a logo was found, artifacts/<project>/assets/cutouts/logo.png is a transparent PNG and the 'logo:' line is present; otherwise the 'logo:' line is omitted and the omission is noted.
